Incoming 1711.10160v1.pdf was the earlier arXiv/PVLDB 2017 version (DOI 10.14778/3157794.3157797; SHA-256 ca0a8c147e8fc157c3600539a247140c1921a009e8814a6ebb715cc61a344737) and was removed as a duplicate after verification. Content and all 22 pages are readable; qpdf reports non-fatal linearization-hint warnings.

Sara Mahdavi and Jason Wei and Hyung Won Chung and Nathan Scales and Ajay Tanwani and Heather Cole-Lewis and Stephen Pfohl and Perry Payne and Martin Seneviratne and Paul Gamble and Chris Kelly and Abubakr Babiker and Nathanael Schärli and Aakanksha Chowdhery and Philip Mansfield and Dina Demner-Fushman and Blaise Agüera y Arcas and Dale Webster and Greg S.
